name: PostgreSQL Database
description: A powerful, open-source object-relational database system with high stability and robust SQL features.

aws.parity: The same Postgres engine version runs locally and on RDS — identical SQL, extensions and wire protocol.
aws.deploy: Provision an RDS/Aurora PostgreSQL instance and repoint your connection string; no app changes required.

variables.label: Database Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the PostgreSQL database.

variables.label: Password
variables.description: The password for the superuser database account.

variables.label: Initial Database
variables.description: The name of the default database created on startup.
